title: Animated Glow Squid
description: Glow Squids are animated just like they are in some promotional art.
body:
**Animated Glow Squids adds an animated texture to the Glow Squid (and its related items) inspired by its appearance in various promotional art and Minecraft Earth.**

**Features affected by this pack:**
- Glow Squids
- Glow Squid Spawn Egg
- Glow Ink Sac

---

![Optifine Required](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad1f350fab99789d35921a36cfac6f0813afdcdd.png)

Disclaimer: This pack requires Optifine or an alternative like Fabulously Optimized. Without it, it will not work!

![A gif of the animated Glow Squid.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Pr8QODmo/images/cafdf075360ac940fdda92d242b5c10f416d6bb5.gif)
